subject: Can I reschedule my pooja date?
snippet: Namaste Rajesh, we can reschedule it to tomorrow. Please confirm if that works.

thread.text: Namaste, I have booked the Satyanarayana Pooja for today. Due to a family emergency I need to know if there is any option to move it to a different date. Please help. Thank you.
Namaste, is there any update on rescheduling?
Namaste Rajesh, we can reschedule it to tomorrow. Please confirm if that works.

subject: When will recording be available?
snippet: I watched the pooja live but wanted to download...

thread.text: I watched the pooja live but wanted to download the high quality recording file to share with my relatives. Will it be sent via email or is it available inside the portal?

subject: Prasad delivery status
snippet: My parcel was dispatched 3 days ago but has not...

thread.text: My parcel was dispatched 3 days ago according to the notification, but the tracking ID is not updating on BlueDart. Can you check if it was picked up?

subject: Booking confirmation not received
snippet: I completed payment but did not get confirmation...

thread.text: I completed payment of Rs.1500 on UPI but did not get any booking confirmation email or slot details. Please verify payment.
Namaste Sunita Devi, we checked our system and confirmed your payment for Booking BK-1004. You should have received the notification on the app now. Let us know if you need more assistance.

subject: Pujari name for my pooja
snippet: Who is the pujari assigned for Satyanarayana?

thread.text: Who is the pujari assigned for Satyanarayana pooja? It says Pt. Sharma Ji or Pt. Acharya? I want to know who is the main priest.
Namaste Kiran Patel, Pt. Sharma Ji is assigned for your Satyanarayana pooja. He will contact you 1 hour before the pooja.
